zh-TW.footer_tagline: 不是只做漂亮畫面，而是幫你把需求變成真正能用的系統。
zh-TW.title2: 到企業級 ERP 平台
zh-TW.subtitle: 16 個獨立領域、4 條 Event Chain、L1~L8 八層架構。每一塊都能單獨擴展，也能透過事件編織成完整的企業營運。
zh-TW.arch_hint: 點任一領域查看 L3 子模組與 Event 流向；切換上方 Chain 看跨領域事件動畫 →
zh-TW.chain_note_order: CRM 接到客戶 → 銷售開單 → MDM 對齊主檔 → 財務開立發票 → Workflow 簽核 → 通知客戶 → BI 更新分析 → 檔案歸檔出貨單
zh-TW.chain_note_payment: 金流回拋 → Sales 對應訂單 → Finance 認列收入 → Notify 發送收據 → BI 即時更新 → Integration 同步銀行
zh-TW.chain_note_tenant: IAM 建立租戶 → MDM 註冊組織主檔 → Metadata 套用客製欄位 → Workflow 啟動 onboarding → Notify 寄歡迎信 → BI 建立租戶儀表板
zh-TW.chain_note_ai: Event Bus 接到觸發 → Data 抽取上下文 → AI 推理決策 → Knowledge 引用內部知識 → Notify 推播結果 → BI 紀錄成效
zh-TW.panel_hint: 選擇任一領域，這裡會列出領域職責、L3 子模組、L4 細項、相關 Event 流向與技術選型。
zh-TW.layer_l1_desc: 企業平台根節點，所有領域共用治理、合規、Feature Flag 與多租戶 Runtime
zh-TW.layer_l24_desc: 16 個獨立 L2 領域、各自 L3 子模組與 L4 細項；領域間以 Event 通訊，不共用 DB
zh-TW.layer_l57_desc: Service / Storage / Runtime 三層具體實作：PostgreSQL、Redis、Kafka、Elasticsearch、Vector DB

iam.purpose: 集中管理使用者身份、權限與 SSO，是所有領域的信任根；任何跨系統存取都先經過 IAM 驗證。

crm.purpose: 管理潛在客戶到 VIP 的全旅程，銜接行銷、銷售與客服，是建立訂單的起點。

sales.purpose: 報價、訂單、合約、訂閱計費的核心交易引擎；金流與庫存的觸發源。

finance.purpose: 最高一致性核心：總帳、應收應付、稅務、財務報表；唯一可以寫入帳務的領域。

workflow.purpose: 跨系統中樞：BPMN 流程、簽核鏈、規則引擎、SLA 追蹤；所有需要人工或多步驟協作都走這層。

event.purpose: Domain 解耦的訊息總線，承載所有跨領域非同步通訊；可靠性、Retry、Replay、Idempotency 的保證者。

data.purpose: ACID 交易、分散一致性、全文搜尋、資料倉儲、Lakehouse；所有讀寫的物理基礎。

mdm.purpose: 商品、客戶、財務、組織主檔的全域唯一真實版本；解決多系統間「同一客戶五個 ID」的痛點。

notify.purpose: 統一發送 Email / SMS / Push / 站內通知與 Webhook；模板、頻率限制、重試集中管理。

file.purpose: 企業檔案的版本、權限、OCR、電子簽章與 Lifecycle；發票、合約、出貨單都在這歸檔。

integration.purpose: 對外連接器集中地：API Gateway、Webhook、ETL、ERP / Bank / Payment / EDI / SOAP 都在這。

bi.purpose: 高層 KPI、營運儀表板、預測分析的唯讀讀模型；只讀不寫，避免污染交易資料。

ai.purpose: AI Native：Agent、推薦、預測、詐欺偵測、Copilot；不是外掛，而是嵌入每個流程的決策層。

metadata.purpose: Dynamic Form / Workflow / UI / Permission 的後設驅動平台；客製欄位不用改 code，運維直接拉。

knowledge.purpose: Knowledge Graph / Semantic Search / RAG / Enterprise Wiki；AI 的長期記憶與企業知識資產。

sre.purpose: CI/CD、Kubernetes、可觀測性、WAF、Secret、SIEM、Multi-region DR；讓整個平台 24×7 不倒。

en.footer_tagline: Not just pretty screens — we turn requirements into systems that actually run.
en.subtitle: 16 bounded contexts · 4 event chains · 8 architectural layers (L1~L8). Each block scales independently, yet weaves into a unified operating fabric through events.
en.arch_hint: Click any domain for L3 modules + event flow. Pick a Chain above for cross-domain animation →
en.chain_note_order: CRM captures customer → Sales drafts order → MDM aligns master data → Finance issues invoice → Workflow runs approval → Notify customer → BI updates analytics → File archives shipment
en.chain_note_payment: Gateway callback → Sales reconciles order → Finance recognizes revenue → Notify sends receipt → BI updates dashboard → Integration syncs bank
en.chain_note_tenant: IAM provisions tenant → MDM registers org master → Metadata applies custom fields → Workflow runs onboarding → Notify sends welcome → BI seeds tenant dashboard
en.chain_note_ai: Event Bus triggers → Data fetches context → AI reasons → Knowledge cites internal facts → Notify pushes result → BI records outcome
en.panel_hint: Pick any domain — purpose, L3 modules, L4 details, related event chains and tech choices appear here.
en.layer_l1_desc: Enterprise root: governance, compliance, feature flags, multi-tenant runtime shared by all domains
en.layer_l24_desc: 16 bounded contexts with their own L3 modules and L4 details. Domains communicate via events, never share DB
en.layer_l57_desc: Service / Storage / Runtime concrete impl: PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Elasticsearch, Vector DB
en.layer_l8_desc: Kubernetes, multi-region failover, disaster recovery, Cloudflare CDN, WAF

iam.purpose: Central authority for identity, permission and SSO — the trust root every other domain depends on.

crm.purpose: Lead-to-VIP journey across marketing, sales and service — the entry point for every order.

sales.purpose: Quote-Order-Contract-Subscription transaction engine — trigger source for payment and inventory.

finance.purpose: Strongest consistency core: GL, AR, AP, tax, statements — the only domain allowed to write books.

workflow.purpose: Cross-system hub: BPMN flows, approval chains, rule engines, SLA tracking for every multi-step process.

event.purpose: Decoupled messaging backbone — guarantees retry, replay, idempotency for all async traffic.

data.purpose: ACID, distributed consistency, full-text search, warehouse, lakehouse — physical foundation of every read/write.

mdm.purpose: Single source of truth for product/customer/finance/org masters — solves the 'same customer, 5 IDs' problem.

notify.purpose: Unified Email / SMS / Push / in-app / webhook delivery — central template, rate-limit and retry.

file.purpose: Versioning, permission, OCR, e-signature, lifecycle for enterprise documents — where invoices and contracts live.

integration.purpose: Outbound connector hub: API Gateway, Webhook, ETL, ERP / Bank / Payment / EDI / SOAP all live here.

bi.purpose: Read-only analytic model for execs and ops — never writes back to transactional data.

ai.purpose: AI-native: agents, recommendation, forecast, fraud, copilot — embedded into every flow, not bolted on.

metadata.purpose: Metadata-driven platform for dynamic form / workflow / UI / permission — custom fields without code changes.

knowledge.purpose: Knowledge Graph, semantic search, RAG, enterprise wiki — long-term memory for the AI layer.

sre.purpose: CI/CD, Kubernetes, observability, WAF, secret, SIEM, multi-region DR — keeps the platform up 24×7.

ja.footer_tagline: きれいな画面だけではなく、要件を本当に動くシステムに変えます。
ja.eyebrow: // プラットフォームアーキテクチャ
ja.title2: エンタープライズ ERP プラットフォームへ
ja.subtitle: 16 のドメイン・4 つのイベントチェーン・L1〜L8 の 8 層アーキテクチャ。各ブロックは独立して拡張でき、イベントで一つの企業オペレーションへ織り上がる。
ja.arch_title: // L2 ドメイン マップ
ja.arch_hint: ドメインをクリックで L3 とイベント表示。上部の Chain でアニメーション →
ja.chain_note_order: CRM が顧客を捕捉 → Sales が起票 → MDM がマスタ整合 → Finance が請求書発行 → Workflow が承認 → Notify が顧客へ通知 → BI が分析更新 → File が出荷書類を保管
ja.chain_note_payment: ゲートウェイ通知 → Sales が注文照合 → Finance が売上計上 → Notify が領収書送信 → BI 即時更新 → Integration が銀行同期
ja.chain_note_tenant: IAM がテナント作成 → MDM が組織マスタ登録 → Metadata がカスタム項目適用 → Workflow がオンボーディング → Notify が歓迎メール → BI がダッシュボード生成
ja.chain_note_ai: Event Bus がトリガ → Data がコンテキスト抽出 → AI が推論 → Knowledge が社内知識を参照 → Notify が結果配信 → BI が成果記録
ja.panel_hint: ドメインを選択すると、責務・L3・L4・関連イベント・技術選定が表示されます。
ja.layer_l1: L1 プラットフォーム
ja.layer_l1_desc: 全ドメインで共有するガバナンス・コンプラ・Feature Flag・マルチテナント Runtime
ja.layer_l24_desc: 16 のドメイン、それぞれの L3・L4。ドメイン間はイベント通信、DB は非共有
ja.layer_l57_desc: Service / Storage / Runtime 具体実装：PostgreSQL、Redis、Kafka、Elasticsearch、Vector DB
ja.layer_l8_desc: Kubernetes、マルチリージョン Failover、DR、Cloudflare CDN、WAF
ja.node_sre: プラットフォーム SRE / セキュリティ

iam.purpose: ID・権限・SSO を集中管理し、全ドメインの信頼基盤となる。

crm.purpose: 見込み客から VIP までの全旅程を管理し、マーケ・営業・サポートを繋ぐ。

sales.purpose: 見積・受注・契約・サブスクの取引エンジン。

finance.purpose: 最高一貫性の核：総勘定・AR・AP・税務・財務諸表。

workflow.purpose: BPMN・承認・ルールエンジン・SLA を司るクロスシステム中枢。

event.purpose: ドメイン疎結合のメッセージ基盤。Retry・Replay・冪等性を保証。

data.purpose: ACID、分散整合、全文検索、DWH、Lakehouse — 全 I/O の物理基盤。

mdm.purpose: 商品・顧客・財務・組織マスタの唯一真実。「同一顧客 5 ID」を解決。

notify.purpose: Email / SMS / Push / アプリ内 / Webhook の統合配信。

file.purpose: バージョン・権限・OCR・電子署名・ライフサイクル。

integration.purpose: API Gateway・Webhook・ETL・ERP/Bank/Payment/EDI/SOAP の外部接続ハブ。

bi.purpose: 経営・運用ダッシュボードと予測の読み取り専用モデル。

ai.purpose: AI ネイティブ：エージェント・推薦・予測・不正検知・Copilot を各フローに埋め込む。

metadata.purpose: 動的フォーム・ワークフロー・UI・権限のメタデータ駆動。

knowledge.purpose: Knowledge Graph・セマンティック検索・RAG・社内 Wiki — AI の長期記憶。

sre.purpose: CI/CD・Kubernetes・可観測性・WAF・Secret・SIEM・DR を担う基盤層。

ko.footer_tagline: 보기 좋은 화면이 아니라, 요구사항을 실제로 작동하는 시스템으로 만듭니다.
ko.subtitle: 16개 도메인 · 4개 이벤트 체인 · L1~L8 8계층. 각 블록은 독립적으로 확장 가능하며, 이벤트로 하나의 기업 운영으로 엮입니다.
ko.arch_hint: 도메인 클릭으로 L3·이벤트 확인. 상단 Chain 으로 애니메이션 →
ko.chain_note_order: CRM 고객 확보 → Sales 주문 → MDM 마스터 정합 → Finance 청구 → Workflow 결재 → Notify 알림 → BI 분석 → File 출고서 보관
ko.chain_note_payment: 게이트웨이 콜백 → Sales 주문 매칭 → Finance 수익 인식 → Notify 영수증 → BI 실시간 업데이트 → Integration 은행 동기화
ko.chain_note_tenant: IAM 테넌트 생성 → MDM 조직 마스터 등록 → Metadata 사용자정의 필드 → Workflow 온보딩 → Notify 환영메일 → BI 대시보드 생성
ko.chain_note_ai: Event Bus 트리거 → Data 컨텍스트 수집 → AI 추론 → Knowledge 내부 지식 인용 → Notify 결과 전송 → BI 성과 기록
ko.panel_hint: 도메인을 선택하면 책임·L3·L4·관련 이벤트·기술 선정이 표시됩니다.
ko.layer_l1_desc: 전 도메인이 공유하는 거버넌스·컴플라이언스·Feature Flag·멀티테넌트 런타임
ko.layer_l24_desc: 16개 도메인, 각 L3·L4. 도메인 간은 이벤트 통신, DB 비공유
ko.layer_l57_desc: Service / Storage / Runtime: PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Elasticsearch, Vector DB
ko.layer_l8_desc: Kubernetes, 멀티리전 Failover, DR, Cloudflare CDN, WAF

iam.purpose: 신원·권한·SSO 중앙 관리, 모든 도메인의 신뢰 루트.

crm.purpose: 리드부터 VIP 까지 전체 여정. 마케팅·세일즈·서비스 연결.

workflow.purpose: BPMN·결재·룰 엔진·SLA 의 크로스 시스템 허브.

event.purpose: 도메인 디커플링 메시지 백본. Retry·Replay·멱등성 보장.

data.purpose: ACID·분산 정합·전문 검색·DW·Lakehouse — 모든 I/O 의 물리 기반.

mdm.purpose: 상품·고객·재무·조직 마스터의 단일 진실. '동일 고객 5 ID' 해결.

notify.purpose: Email / SMS / Push / 인앱 / 웹훅 통합 전송.

bi.purpose: 경영·운영 대시보드와 예측의 읽기 전용 모델.

ai.purpose: AI 네이티브: 에이전트·추천·예측·이상거래·Copilot 을 각 플로우에 내장.

knowledge.purpose: Knowledge Graph·시맨틱 검색·RAG·사내 위키 — AI 의 장기 기억.
